lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Inara — Commodities
sources.what: Market prices, commodity demand/supply, and trade-hub lookups.

sources.label: EDDN
sources.what: Community market-data network that feeds the price and route tools.

sources.label: Spansh — Trade Planner
sources.what: Single- and multi-hop trade-route and loop plotting for profitable round trips.

sources.label: Fandom — Commodities
sources.what: Commodity categories, market-economy types, and supply/demand mechanics.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Opinionated ranking of the top cargo-hauling ships, weighing capacity and trade outfitting from Type-6 to Type-9 and Cutter.
